metadata.title: Our Story | Rovana Jewelry Heritage
metadata.description: Discover Rovana Jewelry's heritage of trust and craftsmanship based in Damascus, Syria.

subtitle: From our first branch to our second — serving Damascus with quality and trust.
quote: Excellence in jewelry is not just about gold and gems, but about the trust we build with every piece we create.

video.title: Our Story
video.description1: At Rovana Jewelry, every piece tells a story of tradition, quality, and artistic excellence passed down through generations.
video.description2: We take pride in crafting jewelry that blends timeless elegance with modern design, creating pieces that celebrate life's most precious moments.

missionVision.subtitle: Guided by tradition, driven by excellence, and committed to creating timeless pieces that celebrate life's most precious moments.
missionVision.missionText: To create exceptional jewelry that combines traditional craftsmanship with contemporary design, providing our clients with timeless pieces that celebrate life's most precious moments while maintaining the highest standards of quality and integrity.
missionVision.visionText: To be Syria's most trusted and beloved jewelry brand, continuing our century-long legacy of excellence while embracing innovation and sustainable practices that will benefit future generations.

heritage.subtitle: From our first branch to our second, we continue to serve our customers with the same dedication and craftsmanship.
heritage.founderCaption: Rovana Jewelry — a name built on trust
heritage.chapter1Text1: We opened our first branch on Khaled Bin Al-Waleed Street with a simple vision: to provide our customers with the finest gold and diamond jewelry, crafted with care and sold with honesty.
heritage.chapter1Text2: Word spread quickly, and our commitment to quality and customer trust became the foundation of everything we do.
heritage.chapter1Address: Khaled Bin Al-Waleed Street, Before Al-Kindi Hospital Entrance, Damascus
heritage.chapter2Text: As our family of loyal customers grew, we opened our second branch in Al-Salihiya to better serve you. A new space, but the same values — exceptional quality, honest dealing, and a passion for fine jewelry.
heritage.marketCaption: Our second branch in Al-Salihiya, Next to Abou Abdo Juice
heritage.addressText: Al-Salihiya, Next to Abou Abdo Juice, Damascus
